title: lastrea divisa
intro: Lastrea divisa, also known as the divided fern or lady fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and Europe, characterized by its delicate fronds and divided pinnae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea divisa lie in its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lastrea divisa typically involve drying the fronds to make tea or infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
